creator: sax@noart.de
text:
lang/gprolog 1.4.4 is marked BROKEN and DEPRECEATED.
I found a new version 1.4.5  on the gprolog website updated in 2019.

Tested only on uname -a:
FreeBSD zardoz.noart.de 12.0-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC  amd64

Compiles without errors and the resulting gplc compiles my prolog-files well.

Detlef
